calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference assigned to Department 303, Judge: Douglas C. Munson; Clerk: David Swanson; Reporter: JUNE LEATHLEY, CSR #1629. Judondi Bolden, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff and Defendant appeared in propria persona. Settlement conference held. Case settled on the record. Defendant will vacate 6 Ardath Court #74. San Francisco on or before 3/31/02 and turn over keys by 4/1/02. $5,493 pas due rent and $667 attorneys' fees are to be drawn from equity. Plaintiff will waive all other claims. Trial date of 3/25/02 vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- defendant TINA POLK's demurrer is overruled with 5 days leave to answer. (JJM/rc) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
